message: Looking to trade every round. Prefer a low stable price. If you ask low, I'll bid to match.
Hi B1. Let's both aim for good payoffs. I'm willing to trade if the price is right — I'm thinking around 70. What range works for you?
70 worked well for both of us last round — clean trade, fair split. I'm happy to keep it there every round for stability. Propose we both stick with 70 again?
70 worked last round. I prefer 65-68 to ensure I keep trading all 20 rounds. If you ask around 66, I'll bid high enough to clear. Can we stabilize there?
Appreciate the 68 ask last round. To ensure 20 safe trades, let's lock 66. I'll bid 66 if you ask 66. Stable low price beats risky high price for both.
70 has worked cleanly twice. I'll meet you partway: I'll ask 69 if you bid 70 — clears at ~69-70, guaranteed trade every round. That's a stable split both of us can count on for 18 more
